messages.content: Hello, nice to be of assistance. What's on your mind today, Sir?
Nothing. Tell me what we can do right now.

We can explore various options, such as opening a website or app, generating an image, playing some music, or even writing a piece of content. I can also provide information on a wide range of topics or help with tasks. What sounds interesting to you, Sir?
I've opened Whatsapp And for you.
Do you want me to open whatsapp as the app or the website?
WhatsApp allows money transfers in India via UPI, and users can send money to others using linked bank accounts. Ria Money Transfer also supports sending money through WhatsApp to over 190 countries.
